headline: Top gainers and losers in the S&P500 index during Thursday's after-hours session.
summary: After the closing bell on Thursday, let's take a glimpse of the US markets and explore the top S&P500 gainers and losers in today's after-hours session.

headline: Edwards Lifesciences Corp (NYSE:EW) Shares Surge After Q1 Earnings Beat and Raised Guidance
summary: Edwards Lifesciences beat Q1 2026 earnings estimates, with EPS of $0.78 and revenue of $1.65B. Shares surged 4.7% after-hours as the company raised full-year guidance, driven by strong TAVR and TMTT sales growth.

headline: Heart-Valve Maker Edwards Lifesciences Pops On First-Quarter Beat
summary: Edwards Lifesciences stock advanced late Thursday on better-than-expected first-quarter sales and earnings.

headline: Edwards Lifesciences Reports First Quarter Results
summary: IRVINE, Calif., April 23, 2026--Edwards Lifesciences (NYSE: EW) today reported financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026.
